content.content: I believe in endless possibilities and the power of creativity.
I'm a passionate software engineer with years of experience building web applications. I love turning complex problems into elegant, user-friendly solutions.

I am a full-stack developer with hands-on experience across the entire development lifecycle, from conceptualization to deployment. I am proficient in TypeScript, React, Node.js, Python, Rust, and Tauri, with solid exposure to cloud infrastructure through AWS and Linux environments. I have practical experience in database management, IoT development, and algorithm optimization.
An all-in-one desktop app for filmmakers that keeps everything from first idea to final shot list in a single place, so creators can focus on storytelling. Check it out at https://cinelaya.com
Anonymous debate site with a matchmaking gimmick based on the latest trends. Check it out at https://myoneweekpersonality.com
I'm always open to discussing projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to collaborate. Feel free to reach out!
